review_title: UI Path - A perfect path to automation
description: My experience with UiPath was positive. I used it to automate invoice processing, extracting data, validating it and posting to an ERP. It reduced manual effort significantly, though it required careful handling during error scenarios.

pros: I liked UiPath’s intuitive design. It made automating complex business processes feel approachable, fast to build, and easy to maintain, even when scaling solutions across teams.
cons: I liked least the frequent version changes and stability issues, which sometimes broke existing workflows and required extra effort to re-test and maintain automations.

RPA makes it possible to speed up operations by automating robots that observe human jobs. review_title: Automate Repetitive Processes easily with UiPath
description: I like the low-code environment that is easy for both beginners and experts in the field to learn. Very intuitive, UiPath Studio is an application, not a web application, so it's much faster and more stable than other low-code tools such as Oracle Integration Cloud. Great online learning through the UiPath Academy, perfect for those new to UiPath or RPA. Easy to hear and very informative. Also, it does not take forever to understand or understand. UiPath Go and third-party support are very helpful in creating automation, as it's likely that someone has already done the same. Automation is open source, so it's very easy to get started. The easy-to-use orchestrator allows you to deploy your robot with minimal stress, and switching from a DEV environment to a PROD environment is very easy.

pros: Data scraping is accurate and extracts the data completely. Excel automation makes it easy to format your data as needed. UiPathGo offers many custom activities such as chatbots and vision automation to help you integrate your application with UiPath. No other tool offers such a possibility. The recording performance is excellent. In particular, both desktop recording and web recording work very well.
cons: Extracting data from an iframe is difficult, but still possible. It's a good idea to provide an Ubuntu version of the UiPath Enterprise RPA platform.

review_title: Automate your Operational Task and focus on what matters!

cons: At least in our company the learning curve is done alone. There is a lot of information and learining material in youtube, but it is difficult to start.

cons: No option to disable auto updates in the settings

description: Found it to be a powerful tool for automating repetitive tasks and increasing productivity

pros: One of the best things about UiPath is its ability to integrate with other software applications, such as Microsoft Excel or Salesforce. This means that users can automate tasks across multiple platforms, making their work more efficient.
cons: Some potential cons of UiPath include a steep learning curve for more complex workflows, limited support for certain programming languages.

review_title: Best RPA software out there
description: Very good, it's definitely the best RPA-software out there. The newer capabilities aren't always great, but their document understanding is getting a lot better too and I'm really curious where they're going with AI Agents.

pros: Cutting edge RPA software, that's improving all the time and expanding capabilities

review_title: easy of use

review_title: Driving Efficiency and Excellence
description: We have successfully delivered 10 high-quality solutions utilizing UiPath's powerful RPA platform. Our expertise in process automation has helped our organizations streamline operations and achieve significant efficiency gains.
author: Prakadeesh V.
pros: UiPath is a leading Robotic Process Automation(RPA) Platform that helps automate repetitive tasks. It offers a user-friendly interface and a wide range of pre-built automation tools. UiPath's scalability, security features, and extensive integration capabilities make it a top choice for organizations seeking efficient process automation solutions. It's comprehensive support and active community contribute to its popularity in the RPA Market.
cons: While UiPath is a powerful RPA platform, I have expressed frustration with the initial learning curve required to effectively use this software.

review_title: Transforming Hardwork to Smartwork
description: We have automated a complete labour contract amendment process where the effort saving is 300+ hours it is now done within a maxmimum of 2-3 hours , previously it was so much manual work,the process involves bulk uploading, taking screenshot changing status in a website and activating the same finally deleting in bulk in addition to it the Db is also updated with the count and status of all these separate activities, all these activities are created as a single workflow and we will schedule the same based on demand . it has reduced a great manual effort.we were able to explore many areas in uipath while implementing this usecase it was a nurturing learning experience and it is successfully up and running in production environment it got us unique recognition among leadership.
author: Divyagomathy V.
pros: The best about this software is all the time consuming mundane recurring activities can be converted in to a simple workflow one time after which it is the robot that takes care of it, and even in case of any error we can set proper messages and notifications,Apart from this all the basic activities are already inbuilt as packages and it also allows us to embed with new packages which are updated with new versions,overall it is an interesting and awesome learning experience.
cons: We got to watch out for the updates every now and then because all the activity components are interlinked with versions and if there is an upgrade the existing version of our workflow may not work as expected, initially faced this challenge but there is a community forum for uipath where all these problems are addressed and sorted out.

review_title: The realest all-in-one automation software with powerful capabilities
description: I am a bit skeptical when it comes to all-in-one automation software. I find that they could not be powerful as much as separated tools with integrations. However, UiPath has proven me wrong. I love that this tool has a global reach with powerful comprehensive capabilities to automate the tedious tasks that I need to complete, and even find more tasks to simplify the operation workflow by finding opportunities from user-interactions and log files from ERPs, UiPath Platform has made my it much easier and has also provided me with all the necessary insights about the work that I do. The best part about UiPath is that it is a relatively inexpensive tool that is worth every penny.
author: Rania S.
pros: My favorite part of UiPath is the Marketplace and the amount of the ready-to-work templates for seamless automations without coding knowledge, Basic or complex processes, the market place is rich with different use-cases and workflows to automate time-consuming tasks so I can focus on the things that matter. I have been using UiPath for many years for my own work, the agency I work for and their clients, I cannot imagine my the operation without it. This software has made it easier to manage the entire operation for the clients seamlessly with insightful visualizations from different departments in a single dashboard. It allows me to have virtual meetings, keep track of my projects, and manage my team. UiPath has helped me and my team to take our business to the next level and to easily manage and monitor a good number of clients with different niches in various industries and I strongly recommend it for marketing agencies, sales and service companies too.
cons: Quite frankly, the last time I didn't like anything about UiPath was when it occasionally froze due to some commands too complex for me to understand. By the way, compatibility with third-party tools isn't always smooth especially when we have to reconfigure several processes by ourselves for new tasks if we couldn't find them. My experience has been mostly positive though because I didn't really have any other serious problems. In fact, at the agency I work for, UiPath handles many operations and large amount of files and automates them in a simple way, among many other options that are truly beneficial to us as a whole, no doubt about that.

review_title: Uipath Review
description: Uipath helps me in solving various problems by automating repetitive tasks and streamlining the workflows such as inputting data from paper forms, responding to common enquiries to relevant department, sending automated notifications to customers, invoicing and HR payroll processes.Overall, Uipath helps businesses save lot of time and reduces manual errors by automating tasks and also allows user's to focus on more high-value activities and increasing overall productivity.
author: Viveka P.
pros: Uipath is an outstanding Robotic Process Automation tool that offers many useful features to automate business processes. It has a user friendly interface with Recording and Playback features which helps to record user's actions on the screen that can be played back to automate our repetitive tasks. It provides set of drag and drop activities that can be used to interact with different systems and applications, such as Excel, PDF, Email and others. Uipath plays most effective role where it provides the advanced feature of AI and Machine learning which helps users to automate more complex tasks which needs the knowledge of cognitive skills like Natural Language Processing and image recognition. Uipath studio plays major role to create and manage automation workflows with beneficial features of debugging, version control and error handling. We can also use custom code in languages such as VB.NET, C#, and Python. Moreover the most tremendous feature in Uipath tool is Uipath-Orchestrator which allows the users to deploy, monitor and manage automation workflows across multiple machines and it also provides various integration options, such as connectors, activities, and APIs that allows users to integrate with third-party applications and services.
cons: Documentation and training resources can be improved to make easier for new users to learn the tool.

cons: I could consider this tool as one of the most complete of its kind, it serves as a way to advance in areas that used to have problems before or solve problems not seen before, without a doubt, it is one of the best

It allows to execute automated human actions performed in browsers and desktop. Also, automating tasks such as Windows login, sending emails with attachments. It is very effective for building integrations with legacy applications and integrates easily with third-party software. The automation of complex processes is one of its best advantages, which are executed while maintaining security levels.

review_title: UiPath - Great tool for Automation

With this tool, I have successfully completed several Business Process Automation (BPA) projects in the healthcare and life science industries.

With UiPath's default Re-Framework, you can efficiently automate processes in web and window applications. It's remarkable data extraction and integration capabilities are incredibly beneficial for streamlining the automation process. It is highly user-friendly.
cons: The licensing cost of UiPath is relatively high, making it difficult for small to medium-sized organizations to afford. Additionally, there are limitations in terms of having the number of robots in the community edition of Orchestrator.

review_title: The Best RPA Tool
description: >Get trained in Uipath using academy and then work with Uipath sales team to get all the required information. I feel UiPath is the best RPA tool in the market now.

pros: I have worked in multiple RPA tools, but I feel UiPath is the best because of the following reasons, 1. User-friendly: Anyone who is new to RPA can able to pick up UiPath because of the ease of designing. 2. Open Source: There are lot of open source tools available which helps us to reduce our works time. 3. Academy: we get learn all the new features and tutorials for free, also providing free certifications allows the developers to learn more and get hands on the tools .
cons: At occasions, UiPath designer get unknown exceptions. There should more flexibility for UipAth selectors. Sometimes detecting screen elements are quite challenging. Elements are varying in different environments, Say if a solution is designed in Dev, but the same is not working properly in SIT and in UAT. so providing more options to improve the selectors will surely help the developers and organizations Also i fell the price is bit high when compared to other tools. if the price is reduced then it would be great.

Also you can be sure that UiPath as a company keep improving the product by taking their customer feedback consistently.

It's customer friendly. They take feeback seriously and help in improving product features. Their product today is nothing but aggregation of all the common customer feedback translated into value added features to UiPath platform. 3. They are quick and they are among the best in RPA space. I've not seen any RPA product company going at the pace at which UiPath is heading. This can only be a great news for consumers because they get to use advancement of UiPath features.
cons: Dependencies update is good but can be improved.

review_title: A great robotic experience!
description: Through my creer i realized above 8 FTE savings across different organization. But, saving manual hours isn't the only benefits achieved during my RPA journey. I collect several operational benefits: - production boost - avoid new hiring - update procedures - reduce learning curve - reduce KT timing - improve customer satisfaction and consideration
author: Mattia M.
pros: Interface. I love interface. I love commands, button, easy to use, intuitive, under continous improvement. During years UiPath grows on market for different reason, main is the friendly interface. Simple drag and drop activity, simple flow design, brings people to speed up learning phase and introduction into RPA world. Antoher point of strenght for UiPath the market approach. Give course for free to everyone brings uiPath to became the most used RPA tool in the world. This enable to create a strong community infrastructure with certified and skilled people, helping each other.
cons: Maybe in some flow UiPath stack for no reason. I mean, when you have some variables or arguments and initialized on "nothing" parameter you change the parameter/argument name UiPath bring to your attention an error message for the assigned variable. You need to delete "nothign" string and write it again. Another improvement point could be the selector management. UiPath doesn't allow you to insert variable inside main selector pane. You need to do it on properties pane.
